name: Cache Eviction Scenario MCQ
templateText: Your backend service processes {REQUESTS_PER_SECOND} requests/second. The database access time is {DB_LATENCY_MS}ms. You introduce a Redis cache with a read latency of {CACHE_LATENCY_MS}ms. If your cache hit rate is {HIT_RATE_PERCENT}%, what is the average database latency per request (excluding cache lookup time on miss)?

exampleHydratedQuestion.questionText: Your backend service processes 5000 requests/second. The database access time is 100ms. You introduce a Redis cache with a read latency of 2ms. If your cache hit rate is 80%, what is the average database latency per request (excluding cache lookup time on miss)?
exampleHydratedQuestion.explanation: Average Latency = (Hit Rate * Cache Latency) + ((1 - Hit Rate) * DB Latency) = (0.80 * 2) + (0.20 * 100) = 1.6 + 20 = 21.6ms.
